summary_sections.title: Lesson Overview
summary_sections.content_html:
Overview

This lesson covers the fundamental measures of center used to analyze and summarize data sets. You'll learn how to calculate and apply the mean, median, and mode, and understand when each is most appropriate.

summary_sections.title: Definitions and Concepts
summary_sections.content_html:
Key Definitions

If ∠A = 70° in parallelogram ABCD, what is ∠B?

Using Properties If ABCD is a parallelogram: AB ∥ CD and AD ∥ BC (definition). The other options — '70°', '90°', and '140°' — are related concepts but do not correctly answer this specific question.

If ∠A = 70° in parallelogram ABCD, what is ∠C?

Using Properties If ABCD is a parallelogram: AB ∥ CD and AD ∥ BC (definition). The other options — '110°', '90°', and '140°' — are related concepts but do not correctly answer this specific question.
